name: R & D Transportation Svc
entity_status: active (HQ Santa Rosa); San Francisco location reportedly closed (per Yelp Oct 2025)
notes: R&D Transportation Services, Inc. is a transportation management/brokerage firm founded May 1991 by Mr. Devlin (former LACOE Director of Transportation). They do not own/operate buses directly; they broker/manage routes for CA Regional Centers and School Districts (no owned fleet, hence no direct FMCSA carrier record). HQ at 2421 Mendocino Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95403; San Francisco branch on Divisadero St reportedly closed. SAFER searches for 'R & D Transportation' returned multiple unrelated carriers (none at the SF Divisadero address). Closest in CA: R & D TRANSPORTATION SERVICES, LLC USDOT 2749210 (Los Angeles) — likely unrelated.
